description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to manually build a binary on Windows (x86-64) when pushing to the qt6 branch or through a workflow dispatch. The workflow should set up a Windows 2022 environment, install necessary tools and libraries including Python 3.13, Qt 6.7.3, PyInstaller, NumPy, PyQt6, and other required modules, build Veusz extensions, create a binary with PyInstaller, generate an NSI file, and create an installer using NSIS. Finally, upload the installer as an artifact.
